a-an.en: I have a dog and an apple.
a-an.zh: 我有一隻狗和一顆蘋果。

ability.en: She has the ability to sing very well.
ability.zh: 她有把歌唱得很好的能力。

able.en: I am able to swim across the river.

above.en: The bird is flying above the trees.
above.zh: 那隻鳥正飛在樹的上方。

abroad.en: My brother studies abroad in Japan.

across.en: We walked across the street together.

act.en: It is kind to act nicely to others.
act.zh: 對別人友善是善良的行為。

action.en: We must take action to help them now.
action.zh: 我們必須現在採取行動幫助他們。

actor-actress.en: The actor played a brave hero in the movie.
actor-actress.zh: 那位男演員在電影裡飾演一位勇敢的英雄。

add.en: Please add some sugar to my tea.
add.zh: 請在我的茶裡加一些糖。

afraid.en: The little boy is afraid of the dark.

afternoon.en: I take a short nap in the afternoon.

age.en: What is your age this year?

ago.en: He left the city three years ago.
ago.zh: 他三年前離開了這座城市。

agree.en: I agree with your good idea.

air.en: The air on the mountain is very fresh.

airplane-plane.en: The airplane is flying high in the sky.
airplane-plane.zh: 那架飛機正在高空飛行。

airport.en: We met our grandma at the airport.
airport.zh: 我們在機場接到了奶奶。

all.en: All of the students are here today.
all.zh: 今天所有的學生都到了。

allow.en: My mother does not allow me to stay up late.

almost.en: It is almost time for dinner.
almost.zh: 快要到吃晚餐的時間了。

already.en: I have already finished my homework.

also.en: She can sing, and she can also dance.

although.en: Although it was raining, we went out.
although.zh: 雖然下著雨，我們還是出門了。

always.en: He always brushes his teeth before bed.

am-a-m.en: I get up at six a.m. every day.

angry.en: Dad was angry because I broke the window.
angry.zh: 爸爸很生氣，因為我打破了窗戶。

animal.en: The lion is a strong animal.
animal.zh: 獅子是一種強壯的動物。

another.en: Can I have another cup of water?

ant.en: A small ant is carrying a leaf.
ant.zh: 一隻小螞蟻正搬著一片葉子。

anything.en: I cannot see anything in the dark.
anything.zh: 在黑暗中我什麼都看不到。

apartment.en: They live in a small apartment in the city.
apartment.zh: 他們住在城裡一間小公寓。

appear.en: The moon appears in the night sky.

apple.en: An apple a day keeps you healthy.
apple.zh: 一天一顆蘋果讓你保持健康。

area.en: This area of the park is for children.
area.zh: 公園的這個區域是給小孩的。

arm.en: He hurt his arm while playing.
arm.zh: 他玩的時候弄傷了手臂。

around.en: There are many trees around the house.

arrive.en: The train will arrive at noon.

art.en: She is very good at art.

ask.en: May I ask you a question?
ask.zh: 我可以問你一個問題嗎？

at.en: We meet at the school gate.

attack.en: The dog will attack if you scare it.
attack.zh: 如果你嚇牠，那隻狗會攻擊。

aunt.en: My aunt gives me a gift every year.
aunt.zh: 我阿姨每年都送我一份禮物。

baby.en: The baby is sleeping in the bed.

bad.en: Eating too much candy is bad for your teeth.
bad.zh: 吃太多糖果對你的牙齒不好。

bag.en: I put my books in my bag.

ball.en: The boy is playing with a red ball.
ball.zh: 那個男孩正在玩一顆紅色的球。

band.en: She plays the drums in a school band.

bank.en: My father keeps his money in the bank.

baseball.en: We play baseball in the park on Sundays.
baseball.zh: 我們週日在公園打棒球。

basket.en: The cat is sleeping in a basket.

basketball.en: He is tall, so he plays basketball well.
basketball.zh: 他很高，所以籃球打得很好。

bat.en: A bat sleeps during the day.

bath.en: I take a warm bath every night.

bathroom.en: She is washing her hands in the bathroom.

be.en: I want to be a doctor someday.

beach.en: We built a sandcastle on the beach.
beach.zh: 我們在海灘上堆了一座沙堡。

bean.en: Green beans are good for your health.
bean.zh: 四季豆對你的健康有益。

bear.en: A big brown bear lives in the forest.
bear.zh: 一隻棕色的大熊住在森林裡。

beautiful.en: The flowers in the garden are beautiful.

because.en: I stayed home because I was sick.
because.zh: 我待在家裡，因為我生病了。

bed.en: I go to bed at nine o'clock.

bedroom.en: My bedroom is small but cozy.
bedroom.zh: 我的臥室雖小但很舒適。

bee.en: A bee is flying around the flower.

beef.en: We had beef noodles for lunch.

before.en: Wash your hands before you eat.

begin.en: The class will begin at eight.

behind.en: The cat is hiding behind the door.

believe.en: I believe you can do it.

bell.en: The school bell rings at noon.

below.en: The fish are swimming below the boat.

belt.en: He wears a black belt with his pants.
belt.zh: 他繫著一條黑色的腰帶搭配褲子。

bench.en: An old man is sitting on the bench.

beside.en: She sat beside her best friend.
beside.zh: 她坐在最好的朋友旁邊。

best.en: He is the best student in our class.
best.zh: 他是我們班最好的學生。

between.en: The ball is between the two boxes.

bicycle-bike.en: I ride my bicycle to school.

big.en: An elephant has a big body.

bird.en: A little bird is singing on the tree.

bite.en: Be careful, the dog may bite you.
bite.zh: 小心，那隻狗可能會咬你。

blind.en: The blind man walks with a stick.
blind.zh: 那位失明的人拄著拐杖走路。

block.en: A fallen tree blocked the road.
block.zh: 一棵倒下的樹堵住了道路。

blow.en: The wind blows the leaves away.

blue.en: The sky is clear and blue today.

boat.en: We rowed the boat on the lake.

book.en: I read a good book before sleeping.

bored.en: I feel bored when it rains all day.
bored.zh: 整天下雨時我覺得很無聊。

boring.en: The long movie was very boring.
boring.zh: 那部冗長的電影很無聊。

born.en: My little sister was born last spring.

boss.en: Her boss is friendly and kind.

both.en: Both of my parents are teachers.

bottle.en: She drank a bottle of water.

bottom.en: The key is at the bottom of the bag.

bow.en: The actor took a bow on the stage.
bow.zh: 那位演員在舞台上鞠了個躬。

bowl.en: I ate a bowl of hot soup.

box.en: She put the gift in a big box.
box.zh: 她把禮物放進一個大箱子裡。

boy.en: The boy is kicking a ball.

brave.en: The brave firefighter saved the cat.
brave.zh: 那位勇敢的消防員救了那隻貓。

bread.en: I eat bread and eggs for breakfast.

breakfast.en: Breakfast is the most important meal.

bridge.en: We walked over the long bridge.

bright.en: The sun is bright this morning.
